transcript.text:
[Brazilian Traditional Steak... Churrasco]
This is All-You-Can-Eat (AYCE)
[Here we go]
[Never-ending line-up of meats]
Where do I even start?
[All unlimited]
[Amazing]
[I had a great meat...]
But can I come back again?
[Let's eat some Churrasco]
[Today's mukbang will be at Apgujeong]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Apgujeong-dong
I've been wanting to come here for a long time It's Texas de Brazil
15 types of AYCE meat
This place is reservations only

They can start entering at 5pm so the line is moving now
9 types of meat for lunch and 15 types of meat for dinner
So I had to come for the dinner menu
[Gangnam-gu, Nonhyeon-ro] [Texas de Brazil]
[Let's enter]
[The servers have been waiting for Tzuyang]
They are big fans of yours
I heard it's AYCE here
You have to eat a lot Don't feel bad
Thank you
There are a lot of meat
This is lunch here
And you can have all of this for lunch All AYCE
I saw when I was coming in and they were serving straight from the skewer
What's Picanha? A lot of this is new to me
[After looking over for a while]

Cheese bread and cooked banana for appetizers
How do I order?
You do not have to order the meat We will come by with all of those meats to serve you
Where is the coin?
It's over here This is a coin?
Red means stop and you want to take a pause
Green means you want the meat
Since you are a big eater, we will have 7~8 meats come straight to you to serve you
Enjoy your time
Amazing
[Salad bar to go with the Churrasco]
[As she's at the salad bar...]
Hello!
[Signature meat]
Grab it
Enjoy your food

How many would you like?
3kg
3kg?!
[It keeps coming out...]
Thank you
Hello
-How many? -3
Thank you
Bon appetit Where do I start?
Tenderloin first
So soft
That's so soft
Let's take a bite
This is like a steakhouse meat
So delicious
It's seasoned perfectly

Look at that It rips right off
So soft
This place is great
Signature
This is the Brazilian Picanha A signature meat
It's just so juicy
I'm loving the smell
The fat ratio
Which one was this again? I forgot
Flank Churrasco
The color
All the meat here is crazy
It's just so juicy And it's on the saltier side
So it's perfect for me
Pork belly I wonder how it will taste
The outside is as crispy as bacon

And the inside is really juicy
This was the braised beef ribs Let's try it
The marbling
Excuse me
This is the Samba-ade
It's a special welcome-drink for you
This is amazing
Everything is tasty
I had 5 meats I can tell others will be good too
The meat is...
Get cooked garlic with pork belly Can't resist this combo
Flank on top
Very good
Cheese too
This is that cheese you scrape off (Grana Padano)
Put it on top

For a bite
Tastes even better now
So flavorful and delicious
It's an apron You can use it if you need to
We're only 1/3rd of the way in
Thank you
It's really good I'm so happy
So yummy
I wanted to try it with the pineapple
Here
It tastes good in any way
It's good with that, that, that, and that
[No time to rest
[Next round of Churrasco]
Can I take a picture?
About 5 please

-How many do people eat? -Usually 1
Thank you
Lamb chops!
Thank you
Where do I even start? Amazing...
Chicken!
Bacon The colors
It doesn't feel like chicken breast It's chewy and tasty
I'll get another ade
Which ones are non-alcohol?
The Caipirinha has cachaça inside but if you would like it non-alcohol we can substitute it with Sprite
Then I will do Passion Fruit Caipirinha and Lemonade Caipirinha
Lamb chops now
Gotta eat it from the bone
All the meat has that meat smell
That savory smell

It spreads in your mouth with every bite
So good
They said this goes well with mint sauce
I had it long ago and I didn't like it
Put some mint sauce
[Chills]
It tastes good, but I personally think it's better without it
This this
He gave me a lot Brazilian Alcatra
This looks like a whole pork belly
Lots of fat
People who don't like fat won't like this
But I love eating the fat part
The meat part is good too
But I like the fat
Pork ribs

Look at the size
Insane I'll use my hands
After 1 bite
It just pops in your mouth
Pops with flavors
The sauce is excellent
Excuse me
[The bevs are here]
A visit for the dinner menu is a must
Lunch is good enough too
But you must try the Tenderloin, Picanha, and Lamb Chops from the dinner menu
Cheese on top
This is the Apgujeong location
Only break-times for weekdays
And as for weekends
There are 2 parts to Lunch And 2 parts to Dinner

So a reservation is a must when you are visiting
Tenderloin Wait, chicken breast
[I am still hungry...]
Excuse me Do you need anything?
[Ordering the next round of Churrasco]
I'll get that ready for you
[Devour everything that's left]
[Round 3]
[Hot]
This is a real sausage
Tenderloin tasted really good earlier
But this is with bacon?
That tenderness and bacon's saltiness
I need more pineapples
It may look small because I'm getting them in pieces
But they are round and thick so it's a good amount

[Let's keep them coming]
Can I just get 1?
What's this?
The side dishes are really great
The best
Roll it like this
So good
I only got 1 of this
Because it's chili pepper I might not enjoy it as much
It's better than I thought but it's spicy
Good thing I only got 1
Garlic Picanha
A very bold garlic taste
The texture is different from a regular Picanha
Some garlic with Garlic Picanha
Parmesan Chicken

A little bigger than buffalo wings
Fill it like this
[Keep it Green]
Lamb leg That's cool
A lot, right?
Eat a lot Love to see it
Pineapple
[Is gone]
[There's the spill]
I'll try the lamb leg now
15th meat Lamb leg
I love the taste of lamb
Last piece
[Finished]
I ate a lot
So I feel bad to pay for only 1 AYCE

-No it's okay -No no
We charge everyone equally
A grown man can't do a full 15-round course
But you got more than 1 piece of meat every time
We're just grateful that you enjoyed your meal
Then can I come back again?
[Just kidding]
Thanks everyone
[We never got to see the Red side of the coin...] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
